channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Brighton draws 0-0 with Brentford in lackluster Premier League encounter
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Brighton had most of the chances but could not find the net in a 0-0 draw with Brentford that extended the south coast club’s winless run in the Premier League to six games on Friday. It was a frustrating night for the home side and especially Julio Enciso.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Browns restructure QB Deshaun Watson's contract to create cap space, flexibility, AP source says
item.description: BEREA, Ohio (AP) — The Cleveland Browns have again restructured quarterback Deshaun Watson's massive contract to create salary-cap space and give them future flexibility, a person familiar with the move told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval won’t follow the team to Sacramento from Oakland
item.description: A's president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization’s planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A’s for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec. 31.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin takes part in a full Capitals practice. He could return Saturday at Toronto
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin's pursuit of Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record should be back on very soon. Signs point to Ovechkin returning to the Washington Capitals' lineup on Saturday night at the Toronto Maple Leafs after missing five weeks with a broken left leg.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inman: 49ers’ Alex Barrett appreciating life in NFL
item.description: Alex Barrett, a backup defensive lineman on the 49ers since 2019, honored his late friend while playing Sunday for the first time in four years.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Jim Larrañaga steps down at Miami, Bill Courtney takes over to finish season
item.description: CORAL GABLES, Fla. (AP) — Jim Larrañaga insists he still loves the University of Miami, still loves the game of basketball, still loves mentoring players, still loves coaching. He doesn't love what college basketball has become. And with that, he's leaving.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pat Riley says the Miami Heat will not trade Jimmy Butler
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — If Jimmy Butler wants a trade, the Miami Heat have no plans to make him happy. Heat President Pat Riley — in a rare move — spoke out to address rumors Thursday, saying the team has no plans to trade Butler.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pro Picks: Chargers over Patriots is the best bet and Broncos and Vikings will pull off upsets
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ Playoff berths, draft positioning and more are up for grabs in Week 17.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears lose rain-soaked rock fight to the Seahawks, drop franchise record-tying 10th straight game
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears final home game of the season against the Seattle Seahawks was offense optional, as rain poured down on Soldier Field in what amounted to a cold, wet rock fight. "I thought special teams played very well.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Colorado's Deion Sanders warns players about smoking ahead of bowl game
item.description: Colorado Buffaloes head coach Deion Sanders made clear he doesn't want anyone smoking in their hotel rooms — or at all — before their bowl game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Holiday Bowl football players visit SeaWorld San Diego
item.description: Football players from the two teams facing off in the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl spent a few hours Wednesday morning celebrating Christmas at SeaWorld San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Bears to host Inspire Change Game at final home game of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL's Inspire Change initiative is hosting a game at Soldier Field to raise awareness for social justice causes, featuring players wearing "Inspire Change" gear, special edition merchandise, and in-stadium activations.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Breaking: Dave Fleming leaves CMU after 20 years
item.description: "I thank Coach Fleming for all his dedication and hard work at CMU," Colorado Mesa Athletic Director Joan McDermott said in a press release. "He is not only a great coach, but a special person and will be greatly missed.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC drops second straight home game, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - While the Utah Hockey Club has won seven in a row on the game, the team continues to struggle at home. Roope Hintz scored his team-leading 15th goal of the season, and the Dallas Stars held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies bounce back with 75-68 win over St. Mary's
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its first loss of the season, the Utah State men’s basketball (11-1, 1-0 MW) got back in the win column Sunday night, closing out non-conference play with a 75-68 win over Saint Mary’s at the UCU Pavilion in Moraga.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Panthers use short-handed goals to beat Lightning 4-2 in opener of home-and-home set
item.description: A.J. Greer and Eetu Luostarinen scored short-handed goals 42 seconds apart in the second period to help the Florida Panthers beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-2 on Sunday to open a home-and-home series.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tiger's son makes the ace. Bernhard Langer makes the winning putt in playoff over Woods at PNC
item.description: Tiger Woods never had so much fun losing in a playoff. For the 67-year-old Bernhard Langer, it never gets old winning the PNC Championship with his son.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7
item.description: Jessie Bates and Matthew Judon each had a pick-6 to carry Atlanta (8-7) to its second straight win after a four-game losing streak put its postseason hopes in jeopardy.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Flames get goals from 6 players in a 6-4 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jonathan Huberdeau, Connor Zary, Blake Coleman, and Matt Coronato each had a goal and an assist as the Calgary Flames beat the Chicago Blackhawks 6-4 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Oakland legend, Hall of Famer Rickey Henderson has died at the age of 65
item.description: (KRON) – Rickey Henderson, one of the greatest baseball players to ever live, died at age 65. Henderson is Major League Baseball’s all-time stolen base leader and is considered by many to be the greatest player in A’s franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Senate passes RFK Stadium land bill, giving the Washington Commanders a major off-the-field win
item.description: The path for the NFL's Washington Commanders to return to the nation’s capital is clear after an on-again, off-again saga in Congress ended early Saturday with a postmidnight reprieve.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UCSD basketball heating up, Tritons on a tear after historic upset
item.description: Fresh after pulling off what might be one of the biggest wins in program history, UCSD men's basketball has no plans on slowing down.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5
